node.statement: (Block-diagonal algebra setup). Let A = ⊕_{i=1}^N M_{d_i}(C). A state φ on A corresponds to a tuple (λ_1 ρ_1, ..., λ_N ρ_N) where λ_i ≥ 0 with Σ_{i=1}^N λ_i = 1 are classical weights and ρ_i is a density matrix on M_{d_i}(C) for each block with λ_i > 0. The constraint φ(1) = 1 gives Σ λ_i = 1. A self-adjoint element a ∈ A^{sa} is a tuple (a_1, ..., a_N) with a_i ∈ M_{d_i}(C)^{sa}, and φ(a) = Σ λ_i Tr(ρ_i a_i).
